from datetime import datetime


def parse_log_entry(line):
    parts = line.split(" | ")
    ts = datetime.strptime(parts[0], "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
    return {"timestamp": ts, "message": parts[1]}


def parse_access_log(line):
    fields = line.split(",")
    ts = datetime.strptime(fields[0], "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
    return {"timestamp": ts, "ip": fields[1], "path": fields[2]}


def parse_audit_record(line):
    segments = line.split(";")
    ts = datetime.strptime(segments[0], "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
    return {"timestamp": ts, "user": segments[1], "action": segments[2]}
